ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock during the trading period */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading period */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded during the period */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time when the market closed for the trading period */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading period */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol used for trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Primary stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "beta" TEXT /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" TEXT /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield */,
  "52_week_high" TEXT /* 52-week high price */,
  "52_week_low" TEXT /* 52-week low price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry within the sector */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of the sector */,
  "average_pe_ratio" TEXT /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of the sector */,
  "average_dividend_yield" TEXT /* Average dividend yield of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data the prediction is based on */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Time when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" TEXT /* Predicted closing price of the stock */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news is related to */,
  "news_time" TEXT /* Time when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was set up */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert condition is met */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
